description: The FireOnFalse node will listen for changes on its input bool and fire an impulse for the specified user whenever the input turns from ``True`` to ``False`` across updates.

fields.OnlyForUser: The user that will listen to the boolean and fire the impulse.
fields.Condition: The bool that should be listened to for changes.
fields.OnChanged: Fires a single impulse from the specified user whenever the provided input turns from ``True`` to ``False`` across updates.

notes.title: See also
notes.text:
* FireOnLocalFalse will fire an impulse for every user that detects ``False`` rather than a specific user.
* FireOnTrue
* FireOnChange
